title: alstroemeriaceae
intro: The Alstroemeriaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic group that contains around 12 genera, primarily native to South America. The family is characterized by its unique, bell-shaped flowers and long, thin leaves. Alstroemeriaceae is often referred to as the 'Peruvian lily' or 'Parrot's beak' family, due to the distinctive shape of its flowers.
